alepulver    2007-02-18 17:49:37 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    .                    modules 
    net                  Makefile 
    net/vde2             Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    net/vde              Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/vde2/files       patch-configure patch-doc__Makefile.am 
                         patch-vde_cryptcab__crc32.c 
  Removed files:
    net/vde2/files       patch-Makefile patch-hash.c patch-port.c 
                         patch-qemu::Makefile patch-qemu::vdeq.c 
                         patch-slirpvde::Makefile 
                         patch-slirpvde::ip.h 
                         patch-slirpvde::libslirp.h 
                         patch-slirpvde::slirp_config.h

  - Add net/vde2 (repocopied from net/vde).
  - Add CONFLICTS between them.
